entries.title: Week 16 still has test rows mixed in
entries.summary: The board file still contains 88 test tasks, so the dashboard is deliberately ignoring them and following the real production plan instead.
entries.detail: Real plan IDs: week16_19 · Test plan IDs: week16_16_test_2
entries.body:
Week 16 has both real and test plan rows in the same board file.

Real plan IDs: week16_19
Test plan IDs: week16_16_test_2

Current behavior:
- the dashboard ignores the test rows so the production view stays stable
- the underlying week JSON still needs cleanup if you want the file itself to be pure production state

entries.title: Active order windows detected
entries.summary: The current production order windows detected from orders.json Week 11-15 · Week 16-19 · Week 16-16 · Week 17-17.
entries.body:
